creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

We have agreed to mark this PR as suspended. We current have this in MC CVS, 
but we feel that webkit-gtk isn't ready. The webkit-gtk's API/ABI aren't 
stable and it might breaks other stuff often. It probably will coming with 
GNOME 2.24 or when webkit-gtk is complete ready.
